scripts.dev: concurrently -n app,admin,api -c blue,green,red "npm run dev -w playground/app" "npm run dev -w playground/admin" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.dev:front: concurrently -n app,admin -c blue,green "npm run dev -w playground/app" "npm run dev -w playground/admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w playground/app && npm run build -w playground/admin
